ladder.burden_to_beat_integrity: produce Pi33 or delta33 inside certified public-integral span; currently false
ladder.what_is_known: 36-dimensional operation algebra; 1-dimensional integrity-integral subspace; 35-dimensional commutator-visible complement

ladder.burden_to_beat_integrity: provide a public proof trace that derives an e33 detector without V/X; forbidden by current finite typing
ladder.what_is_known: steps operate on public clauses and remain pure C when proof witnesses are public

ladder.burden_to_beat_integrity: show the extractor is public-integral or provide the hidden e33 map; otherwise counted as X
ladder.system: CDCL with native XOR / Gaussian elimination over GF(2)
ladder.what_is_known: constructs a parity/coorientation system explicitly; this is not public-integral

ladder.burden_to_beat_integrity: prove it acts through public data without hidden parity; otherwise X
ladder.system: Polynomial calculus over GF(2) / algebraic parity proof
ladder.what_is_known: field choice directly carries parity structure; typed as explicit hidden-character algebra

ladder.burden_to_beat_integrity: type each learned inequality: public consequence, commutator-visible wall step, or hidden extractor
ladder.system: Cutting planes / pseudo-Boolean / integer linear proof
ladder.what_is_known: public inequalities are C; parity/cardinality gadgets that recover hidden sector are X

ladder.burden_to_beat_integrity: certify extension variables preserve public kernel; otherwise mark as X
ladder.what_is_known: public definitional extensions may be C; extensions that reconstruct e33 are X

ladder.burden_to_beat_integrity: compile each formula/inference into C/V/X with polynomial overhead
ladder.what_is_known: too expressive to call public-integral without sector-interface semantics

ladder.burden_to_beat_integrity: provide dual/transform certificate and show whether it is public C, visible V, or extractor X
ladder.what_is_known: global basis changes can hide extractor construction

ladder.burden_to_beat_integrity: prove faithful polynomial integrity trace or exhibit a solver outside the type system
ladder.what_is_known: must be compiled to sector-interface trace to enter finite theorem

summary.main_message: Known proof systems now receive an integrity type. Public proof systems are C; parity/algebraic hidden extractors are X; certified wall-crossing is V; arbitrary P-time remains the universality bridge.

theorem.name: Proof-System Integrity Ladder
theorem.statement: Standard solver/proof-system steps can be placed on the C/V/X integrity ladder. Public proof systems remain C and cannot see e33; parity/algebraic extractors are X; certified commutator wall-crossings are V; arbitrary polynomial-time solvers remain the open universality tier.
theorem.use: This identifies exactly what kind of evidence is required to challenge or complete the No-Escape theorem.

theorem_ladder.conclusion: operation is C iff Delta=0; otherwise commutator-visible V
theorem_ladder.name: Finite Integrity Theorem

theorem_ladder.assumption: solver trace consists only of public resolution/CDCL proof steps
theorem_ladder.conclusion: trace is C and cannot extract e33
theorem_ladder.name: Proof-Logged Public Solver Corollary

theorem_ladder.conclusion: solver enters X by explicit extractor-adjoin
theorem_ladder.name: Parity-Solver Classification

theorem_ladder.assumption: solver uses extensions, cutting planes, SDP, or spectral steps
theorem_ladder.conclusion: each step must be certified C/V or marked X
theorem_ladder.name: Mixed-System Integrity Audit
theorem_ladder.status: contract built; proof depends on supplied trace

theorem_ladder.assumption: every polynomial solver has a faithful polynomial integrity trace
theorem_ladder.conclusion: any solver deciding e33-obstructed instances must contain V or X
theorem_ladder.name: Algorithmic Universality Theorem

theorem_ladder.assumption: Algorithmic Universality + no polynomial X-extractor for hidden e33 family
theorem_ladder.conclusion: public-integral polynomial solving fails; full separation follows for the encoded family if SAT-complete
theorem_ladder.name: Conditional P-vs-NP No-Escape
